title: Consent for an Access to Information and Personal Information Request (IMM 5744) - Canada.ca
content:
## Consent for an Access to Information and Personal Information Request (IMM 5744)
This application includes the following items:
- Consent for an Access to Information and Personal Information Request [IMM 5744] ( PDF , 1.62 MB ) October 2018
This form is for people who wish to authorize the Access to Information and Privacy (ATIP) Division at Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) to release their personal information to an individual that they designate.
